name.description: Required human-facing map name (also the selection key, case-insensitive).

mode.description: Optional game-mode label shown in the lobby's map picker (e.g. "Conquest"); purely descriptive, defaults to "CONQUEST" when omitted.

sector-scale.description: Optional map-level override of the world's sector-scale multiplier; omitted inherits the loaded world.yaml value.

asteroid-density.description: Optional map-level override of the world's asteroid density; omitted inherits the loaded world.yaml value.

sector-radius.description: Default sector radius (× sector-scale) for any sector that omits its own radius; omitted inherits the world's sector-radius.

links.description: Gate (aleph) topology as bidirectional sector-id pairs, e.g. [[0, 1], [1, 2]]; omitted links sectors in a ring by id.

id.description: This sector's numeric id, referenced by garrison and links.

radius.description: Absolute radius in world units; omitted falls back to the map or world sector-radius × scale.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the sector overview and lobby preview.

team.description: The team id (0-based) that owns this garrison / home base.

garrison.description: Optional team garrison (home base) in this sector; the set of garrisons across the map decides how many teams it supports.

asteroids.description: Asteroid distribution shape: "field" (disc), "belt" (ring), or "none"; omitted defaults to "field".

asteroid-density.description: Optional per-sector multiplier on the world asteroid density.

he3-min.description: Optional per-sector override of the minimum guaranteed He3 rock count (world mining default otherwise).

he3-max.description: Optional per-sector override of the maximum guaranteed He3 rock count (world mining default otherwise).

he3-fraction-mult.description: Optional per-sector multiplier on the world He3 fraction before the count clamp.

special-count.description: Optional per-sector override of the count of RARE special rocks (Carbonaceous/Silicon/Uranium); 0 -> none. World mining default otherwise.

ore-richness-mult.description: Optional per-sector multiplier on the per-He3-rock ore capacity here.

map-pos.description: 2D map-diagram position [x, y], normalized roughly -1..1, where this sector's node draws on the minimap/lobby preview; omitted auto-lays out in a ring.

elevation.description: Sun direction elevation above the horizon, degrees.

color.description: Sun light color as [r, g, b].

ambient.description: Ambient/fill light energy for the sector; omitted uses the client default.

size.description: Visible sun-disc width in world units; omitted defaults to 900.

god-rays.description: God-ray (volumetric light shaft) intensity from the sun.

sun.description: Directional sunlight settings for this sector.

color-a.description: First nebula gradient color as [r, g, b].

color-b.description: Second nebula gradient color as [r, g, b].

seed.description: Optional random seed for the nebula's procedural pattern.

nebula.description: Background nebula backdrop settings for this sector.

amount.description: 0..1 how dusty the cloud looks (visual coverage/count/thickness).

opacity.description: 0..1 how heavily the dust cuts radar/vision sightlines; omitted defaults to 1.

color.description: Dust particle color as [r, g, b].

seed.description: Optional random seed for the dust cloud's procedural pattern.

environment.description: Optional per-sector environment (sun, nebula, dust); omitted keeps the sector's legacy default look.

sectors.description: The map's sectors, each declaring its geometry (radius, garrison, asteroids, map-pos) and environment; anything omitted falls back to one shared default.
